publishedAbstract: * After a rebuild of Noobaa, the `rook-ceph-operator` pod was logging the following error, indicating that a `CephObjectStoreUser` couldn't be removed due to `BucketAlreadyExists`. ~~~ failed to reconcile CephObjectStoreUser "openshift-storage/noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user". failed to delete ceph object user "noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user": failed to delete ceph object user "noobaa-ceph-objectstore-user".: BucketAlreadyExists tx000000XXXXXXXXXXXXXXX-XXXXXXXXXX-XXXXXXXX-odf-storagecluster-cephobjectstore XXXXXXXX-odf-storagecluster-cephobjectstore-odf-storagecluster-cephobjectstore ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF Noobaa failed to reconcile CephObjectStoreUser with error failed to delete ceph object user ... BucketAlreadyExists
